room.caption: [25_Ext] It's like a map with turbines within a map with turbines.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(25)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh7MainA)
backGrad=instance_create(0,0,oCh7GradientBack) backGrad.type=1 backGrad.colorTop=make_color_rgb(0,0,144) backGrad.yStart=183
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(7) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
